item.title: Whacked out Wednesday memes or whatever I don’t know, just enjoy
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
I have to tell every door dasher that so they can find my house because Google is wrong
Amen
Boomer humor is still alive at Disney
Had a boss that watched porn at work and we all knew it. He didn’t ever get fired.
Time for another trip to HR
When I was a kid, the adult store said Christie’s Toy Box so I thought it had toys. Was so annoyed that my parents wouldn’t take me there. I went as an adult. Boring. I want real toys!
Diabolical
Creative thinker
I hope that’s not his real head
Too bad. Tummy wants its happy food.
He all mad
I’ll bet the hostess laughed her butt off
That’s…interesting
Yes, I’ll also have water
This is why I don’t eat crunchy people’s food
Is there even tea in the cup?
It’s probably got more followers than you
Had he grown into an adult during the coma?
Notice the sarcasm
The rest of the men out the rest of the French?
I want all of there
Trash panda
Sometimes I wonder if the writers DID know these were dirty and just laughed knowing the innocent comic readers wouldn’t get it
Oops, it’s too high
How I adult
Always buy the treat
The Internet isn’t the place to look for that
Where’s the fan?
But did it help your headache?
Important things to consider in a relationship
Should get a fake one, put it on, and rub it off in front of them
I’m totally not a virgin
Want this for my house
No seatbelt?
Wow
Took me a minute to realize he was talking about the girl
I don’t understand doctors.
Um plot twist: it didn’t work
Don’t do that in the South
Me too
Yup
Someone was smart
Yup
My son
Worst
Heck yeah
Comfort is key
Heck yeah
Every time

I hope people start to wonder why it’s the socialists that care enough to get things done as the liberal politicians tell you that you have to be patient for change that they half heartedly fight for
That’s the choice. Pretty clear which one we’re doing right now

item.title: Crisco is my lord and savior
item.dc:creator: svardfiska

item.title: FAFO :)
item.description: morbidtruth In 2019, a couple from Visalia—Corey Cornutt, 25, and Savannah Grillot, 29—were accused of repeatedly setting traps for suspected thieves after experiencing multiple break-ins to their own vehicles. According to investigators, the pair left an unlocked bicycle in their front yard as bait, then waited for someone to attempt to take it. When a person approached or tried to steal the bike, the couple allegedly rushed out armed with aluminum baseball bats and attacked them. Police said the incidents occurred between July and November 2019 and that the couple recorded the confrontations on video before posting them to YouTube and Facebook. Authorities identified at least four victims, including one who required hospital treatment for non-life-threatening injuries. Neighbors reported frequently finding blood on nearby streets and sidewalks after the alleged ambushes, and investigators noted that the couple never contacted law enforcement to report the attempted thefts. In January 2020, the pair were arrested and charged with assault with a deadly weapon and conspiracy. However, later legal developments revealed that local prosecutors ultimately declined to pursue the case, and the couple was cleared of criminal wrongdoing. https://www.instagram.com/morbidtruth/ https://www.wric.com/news/u-s-world/couple-left-bikes-in-yard-to-lure-thieves-beat-them-with-bats-and-post-videos-to-youtube-police-say/
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants
rainbowcrab95772

item.title: I quit smoking for a chance to date this gorgeous woman--have been smoke free since, happily married almost 20 years now
item.description: Broke a friend zone of over 7 years, she's my everything!

item.title: More great moves! USA leads the way!
item.description: https://www.yahoo.com/news/science/articles/scientists-warn-trump-plan-axe-100031345.html : "Ocean heat content is the most robust indicator of climate change we have – not just of what is happening in the ocean, but of the entire climate system". Vertical temperature profiles that provide ocean heat content, are "amongst the simplest measurements we can make", she said. "Lose them, and you lose your ability to track not just ocean warming but the climate system as a whole – they are a proxy for variables that become unavailable the moment the observations stop.
item.dc:creator: DuraAce9sp

item.title: GovBrief Today #496
item.description: Alabama doesn't need nitrogen gas to execute Jeffery Lee tonight, but keeps fighting to use it. The federal judge who ruled the nitrogen method cruel and unusual left two other methods available. Alabama appealed for the right to use the gas and lost again Wednesday night. Now the state is asking the Supreme Court. Lee's jury voted for life imprisonment almost thirty years ago, but the trial judge overruled them using a practice the state later abolished. Veterinary guidelines reject using this gas on most animals unless they are sedated first, and Alabama's protocol includes no sedative. Alabama already has the right to execute Lee tonight. What it's fighting for is the chance to do it in a way your local vet wouldn't. I've emailed 7,766 stories over 496 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at the website and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260610-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june10 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/rollins-screwworm [3] https://go.govbrief.today/gates-house [4] https://go.govbrief.today/pipe-break [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fla-maps-upheld [6] https://go.govbrief.today/inflation-rises [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-loves-inflation [8] https://go.govbrief.today/china-websites [9] https://go.govbrief.today/leon-warning [10] https://go.govbrief.today/nitrogen-appeal [11] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-garden-grove [12] https://go.govbrief.today/johnson-cfpb [13] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-club-health Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Memes vol 701 Marvel and DC
item.description:
Have you guys seen the new cover of X-men outback
Part of this isn’t true for me personally. Also he’s 19 to ME (for the obvious reasons but also because I was 19 when it came out and idk I just think that’s cool)
But the greatest comic book villain performance is Antony Starr as Homelander. Genuinely the best acting I’ve ever seen in my entire life
Have you guys seen what metro boomin looks like irl- cutie patootie oh my goodness
Imgur let me post videos challenge (impossible)
I LOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOVE HIS LAUGH AND HIS “good” BWAHHHHHHHH
Nessie tax
